# ScarletFlash Consulting

> Creative + Tech Consulting — Where Ideas Ignite

ScarletFlash Consulting brings 20+ years of design, product, and technology expertise to help creative agencies sharpen their edge, startups turn bold ideas into scalable products, and small businesses grow smarter - bringing the clarity, strategy, and execution to move you forward with confidence and measurable momentum.

- Website: https://scarletflash.io
- Contact: https://www.scarletflash.io/#contact
- Location: Bengaluru, India (serving clients globally)

## Services

### Product + UX Design
We turn tangled workflows and bold ideas into clean, intuitive experiences users love. From
research and wireframing through prototyping and high-fidelity design — every decision is
grounded in clarity and usability.

### Tech Strategy + Application Development
Smart tech strategy and custom-built applications that turn your vision into working, scalable
software. Stack evaluation, architecture decisions, and end-to-end development delivered with
speed and precision.

### Automation + Tooling
Smart automation and hand-picked tooling that keeps your team lean, fast, and always in flow.
We identify the right tools, eliminate repetitive work, and build systems that scale with you.

## How We Work

1. **Discover** — Deep dive into your goals, constraints, and opportunities.
2. **Define** — Sharp brief. Clear scope. No ambiguity.
3. **Build** — Quick sprints with full visibility. Real work, fast feedback loops.
4. **Launch** — Ship with confidence. We stay close through go-live and beyond.

## About

**Founder:** Arun V. Sarma — Founder & Principal Consultant
**Experience:** 20+ years across design, product, technology, and leadership

Arun V. Sarma is the mind behind the momentum — a Designer, Developer, and Strategist who
brings all three disciplines to every engagement.

**As a Designer:** Focuses on crafting clean, intuitive designs at the intersection of user
intuition, functional precision, and data intelligence. Tools: Figma + Claude, Data
Visualization, User Experience.

**As a Developer:** Writes purposeful, functional code that brings design to life, powers
complex applications, and solves real problems efficiently. Stack: HTML + CSS, JavaScript,
NodeJS, ReactJS, Angular.

**As a Strategist:** Crafts end-to-end solutions that connect the right data to the right
decisions, helping brands engage smarter, market adaptively, and stay ahead. Focus areas:
Actionable Insights, Solution Architecture, Strategy Consulting.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What does ScarletFlash Consulting do?**
A: ScarletFlash Consulting is a creative and technology consulting firm with 20+ years of expertise. We help creative agencies, startups, and small businesses with product + UX design, tech strategy & application development, and automation & tooling — combining human expertise with AI capability to deliver fast, measurable results.

**Q: Who is ScarletFlash best suited for?**
A: ScarletFlash works with creative agencies looking to sharpen their competitive edge, startups ready to turn bold ideas into scalable products, and small businesses that want to grow smarter with clearer strategy and execution.

**Q: What services does ScarletFlash offer?**
A: Three core areas: Product + UX Design, Tech Strategy + Application Development, and Automation + Tooling.

**Q: What does the engagement process look like?**
A: Four phases — Discover, Define, Build, and Launch — focused on speed, clarity, and measurable outcomes.

**Q: How do I start a project with ScarletFlash?**
A: Use the contact form at scarletflash.io. Share your project details and we'll respond within one business day.

## Contact

To start a project or ask a question, use the contact form at https://scarletflash.io/#contact. We respond within one business day.
